affiliate_dashboard.terms_intro: By joining the SeenYT Affiliate program, you agree to fully comply with the following terms:
affiliate_dashboard.term_1: • Commission: 30% for first purchase, 10-15% for upgrades, 10% for monthly renewals.
affiliate_dashboard.term_3: • Minimum withdrawal: 1,000,000 VND (rounded down to the nearest hundred thousand).
affiliate_dashboard.term_4: • Payments made on the 20th-25th of each month via bank transfer.
affiliate_dashboard.term_5: • Self-referrals, group/comment spam, and false advertising (promising easy money) are prohibited.
affiliate_dashboard.term_6: • SeenYT reserves the right to cancel commission if terms are violated or if the user refunds within 30 days.
affiliate_dashboard.term_7: • Affiliates are responsible for declaring personal income tax according to Vietnamese law.
affiliate_dashboard.term_8: • SeenYT reserves the right to change terms (with 30 days prior notice).

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: I'm a complete beginner, is SeenYT easy to use?
faq.a1: Extremely easy! We designed the interface specifically for non-tech-savvy users. With a 3-step, hand-holding process, you just need to follow the instructions to create a video.
faq.q2: Does SeenYT help my videos go viral/trending?
faq.a2: Yes! Our tool uses AI to analyze YouTube's algorithm, find trending topics, and guide you on how to optimize (SEO, Thumbnail, Script) to maximize your chances of being recommended.
faq.q3: Can I monetize videos created with SeenYT?
faq.a3: Absolutely. You own 100% copyright of the videos you create. Many of our users have enabled monetization and are earning revenue from YouTube and Affiliate programs.

finalCTA.title: STEP INTO THE BATTLE, DON'T JUST BE A SPECTATOR.

virtual-mc.name: Create Virtual MC (AI Idol) - Lip Sync
virtual-mc.short: Create a virtual MC speaking from a photo.
virtual-mc.long: Tool to create a virtual MC speaking from a photo. Automate host, news, or training videos without direct filming.

image-forge.name: Image Creation - AI Thumbnail Design
image-forge.long: Design thumbnails using artificial intelligence. Automatically analyzes colors and layouts to stimulate high click-through rates (High CTR).

text-to-speech.name: Text to Speech
text-to-speech.long: Convert text into emotional speech. Supports multiple languages and many natural-sounding voices.

seo.name: SEO & Keyword Optimization
seo.short: Optimize keywords for YouTube 2026 algorithm standards.
seo.long: Tool for analyzing and optimizing keywords to YouTube's 2026 algorithm standards. Supports generating video titles, tags, and descriptions.

micro-niche-miner.name: High CPM Niche Mining
micro-niche-miner.long: Deep dive into micro-niche markets to optimize for TOP ranking potential.

dubbing.name: AI Dubbing Studio (Voice Over)
dubbing.long: Turn international videos into your own. Automatically translate, dub into Vietnamese, and lip-sync (Auto-Dubbing).

velocity.name: AI Video Creation
velocity.long: Software for automated Faceless video creation. Supports a library of high-quality stock videos.

scriptwriter.name: Viral Scriptwriter
scriptwriter.long: Tool to write scripts with viral-standard structure. Focuses on optimizing the first 30 seconds (Hook) to retain viewers.

narrative-studio.name: History Storytelling / Story
narrative-studio.long: Tool to support in-depth storyline creation and content direction. Helps build profound scripts.

script-refiner.name: Script Editing & Upgrading
script-refiner.short: Optimize text, edit tone of voice.
script-refiner.long: AI text optimization solution that improves wording and refines tone for a more natural and professional feel.

rival-scanner.name: Competitor Channel Analysis
rival-scanner.long: Deeply scan and analyze competitor strategies. Provides data on the most effective keywords.

hidden-channel-finder.name: Green Niche Finder
hidden-channel-finder.long: Tool to discover small YouTube channels experiencing explosive growth. Helps find untapped niche topics.

thay-youtube.name: YouTube Master - 30-Day Curriculum
thay-youtube.long: Accompanying you through your first 30 days on YouTube. Provides detailed daily curriculum and supporting tools.

niche-engine.name: 100% Winning Niche Library
niche-engine.short: Select niche & Generate Long Video script.
niche-engine.long: The Long Video Engine helps you choose winning niches, analyze opportunities, and generate detailed content deployment packages.

future-eye.name: FUTURE-EYE AI - Future Videos
future-eye.long: Dedicated AI tool for producing YouTube videos in Future/Disaster/Technology niches. Automatically generates 12 topics, writes 2000-word scripts.

winning_niche.title: 100% Winning Niche Library
winning_niche.desc: A treasure trove of proven successful niches.
winning_niche.updating_desc: We are compiling data from thousands of successful channels to bring you a list of "unbeatable" niches.

keyword-research.name: Keyword Research (Keyword.io)
keyword-research.long: Powerful keyword research tool to help you find high-search volume, low-competition keywords. Integrates AI to suggest content strategies.

x-hot-news.name: X-Trend Hunter Pro
x-hot-news.short: Hunt X trends & Auto-generate viral videos.
x-hot-news.long: Dedicated Admin tool: Scans hot trends from X (Twitter), analyzes viral opportunities, and automatically writes multi-language video scripts (EN/JP/KR/ES).

footer.tagline:
SeenYT's mission is to empower every Vietnamese creator – especially beginners, no experience, no large capital needed – to create quality content, find high-earning niches, optimize SEO, thumbnails, scripts… to turn their YouTube passion into a real and sustainable income source.
We believe that: Everyone deserves a chance to shine on YouTube, regardless of their starting point. And SeenYT will always accompany you on that journey.
